message:
feat(api): Add modular rate limiting for support tickets

Extract rate limiting logic from inline Maps into a reusable module:

- Create /lib/rate-limit/rate-limiter.ts with InMemoryRateLimiter class
- Add configurable window and max requests parameters
- Implement automatic bucket pruning for memory efficiency
- Add check() for incrementing and peek() for status queries
- Include checkMultipleLimits() helper for combining limiters
- Document serverless limitations and Upstash upgrade path

Update support tickets route to use the new module:
- Replace inline Map-based rate limiting
- Use combined IP + email limits via checkMultipleLimits()
- Add clear documentation about in-memory limitations

Note: In-memory rate limiting resets on Vercel deployments and
cold starts. This provides per-instance protection only. For
stronger guarantees, configure Upstash Redis via env vars.

Closes: bd-2kwr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+export {
+  createRateLimiter,
+  checkMultipleLimits,
+  type RateLimiter,
+  type RateLimitConfig,
+  type RateLimitResult,
+} from "./rate-limiter";
